name: tvfetch
description: Fetch TradingView market data — historical OHLCV, live streaming, indicators, analysis

settings.name: TV_AUTH_TOKEN
settings.description: TradingView auth token (JWT) for paid plan access. Anonymous mode works without it (daily/weekly/monthly get full history). Get via browser: DevTools Console > document.cookie.split('; ').find(c=>c.startsWith('auth_token=')).split('=').slice(1).join('=')

settings.name: TVFETCH_CACHE_PATH
settings.description: Custom path for SQLite cache file (default: ~/.tvfetch/cache.db)

settings.name: TVFETCH_PROXY
settings.description: HTTPS proxy URL for WebSocket and HTTP connections
